raw_response:
## Changements v1 → v2

**Breaking:**
- `create_user()` (ambig/mod1.py) — supprimé
- `delete_webhooks()` (routers/webhooks.py) — supprimé
- `authenticate_user()` (services/auth.py) — params `payload`+`user_id` supprimés, `credentials` ajouté sans défaut
- `compute_invoice()` (services/billing.py) — supprimé
- `bulk_import_members()` (services/members.py) — supprimé
- `slugify()` (utils/strings.py) — supprimé

**Non-breaking:**
- `create_regular_user()` (ambig/mod1.py) — ajouté
- `calculate_invoice()` (services/billing.py) — ajouté
- `routers/billing.py` — refactor body-only sur `list/create/get/update/delete_billing` + `add_member_to_billing`
- `buggy_paginate()` (utils/buggy_pagination.py) — refactor body-only
